## Safety and privacy checklist

- [ ] I am authorized to contribute and test every artifact used for this change.
- [ ] This PR does not include or link to any IPA, third-party binary, credential,
      raw UDID, signing certificate, provisioning profile, receipt, or other
      sensitive device or account data.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, manifests, and diagnostics are sanitized.
- [ ] The change does not add downloading, redistribution, license bypass,
      credential collection, or unrelated device-data extraction behavior.
- [ ] I added or updated tests and documentation where appropriate.
